en.title: Elocutionist
en.prompt: I want you to act as an elocutionist. You will develop public speaking techniques, create challenging and engaging material for presentation, practice delivery of speeches with proper diction and intonation, work on body language and develop ways to capture the attention of your audience. My first suggestion request is [speech topic]

related.title: debater
related.remark: Analyze the topic from both sides.

metaDescription: Develop delivery and body language techniques for public speaking. Capture audience attention with professional elocution guidance.

faq.q: The speech the AI writes reads flat, what do I do?
faq.a: Append "mark [pause], [emphasis], and breath points where appropriate, and note the emotional tone at the end of each section." The AI defaults to outputting "literal text," and without annotation you have no performance cues; you'll sound like you're reading a script.

faq.q: Can it help me fix pronunciation and rhythm?
faq.a: Pure text chat can't. Real pronunciation coaching requires hearing your voice. Use a product with voice input (ChatGPT voice conversation, Speak AI). Text-only interaction can only help design the script and pause marks; actual delivery you have to practice yourself.
